Class ModelReplyManagement

java.lang.Object
MVCReplyManagement.ModelReplyManagement
public class ModelReplyManagement extends Object
Model layer for managing replies in memory. Handles creating replies and tracking IDs.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Creates the model object.

  • Method Details

    • getNextReplyId

      public static int getNextReplyId()
      Generates the next available reply ID.
      Returns:
      the next reply id

    • createReply

      public static Reply createReply(int id, int parentPostId, String body, String author)
      Creates a new reply and stores it in memory.
      Parameters:
      id - the reply id
      parentPostId - the parent post id
      body - the reply body
      author - the reply author
      Returns:
      the new reply

    • getReplyStorage

      public static ReplyStorage getReplyStorage()
      Provides access to the reply storage.
      Returns:
      the reply storage
